Notice And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Elvy Barrera's motion is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff to submit proposed order on or before August 21, 2009. JUDGE RICHARD B. ULMER, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
